hyperedges.label: Core MVP Features: scroll, save, shopping list, weekly menu, auth, offline
Flutter Tech Stack: riverpod + go_router + drift + dio + secure_storage
Culinary Flow Design System: colors, typography, layout applied in mockups
Specification Documents Triad: CDC + SFG + SFD
Shopping List DB Pipeline: weekly_menus -> menu_entries -> recipe_ingredients -> shopping_list
Onboarding Flow: Welcome -> Dietary Preferences -> Skill Level
MVP Core Features: Scroll, Filter, Save, Menu, Shopping List
Shared Design System (Tailwind, Montserrat/Inter, Material Icons, Primary #ae2f34)
All Screens share Bottom Navigation Bar
User Stories by Persona: Karenn (meal planning) and Antoine (gamification/scroll)
All main screens share Bottom Navigation Bar with 5 tabs
iOS Flutter plugin set: flutter_secure_storage, path_provider, sqflite, sqlite3_flutter_libs
CookScroll UI Mockup Screens - all 5 main app screens
Onboarding 3-screen flow: Welcome -> Dietary -> Skill -> /feed
OnboardingDietaryScreen + OnboardingSkillScreen share state via onboardingNotifierProvider
All auth screens reference AppColors for consistent theming
appRouter registers all onboarding + auth screens as GoRoute entries
App entry wiring: main() → ProviderScope → CookScrollApp → appRouterProvider → MaterialApp.router
MainScaffold bottom nav connects 5 routes to feature screens
All feature screens are placeholders ('coming soon') except RecipeDetailScreen which accepts recipeId param
Shared widgets (DotsIndicator, MainScaffold) both consume AppColors from core/theme
